layerMap.name: Documentation layer
observedFacts: README.md is present and provides the visible repository context.
layerMap.interpretation: The example repository can only support a documentation-level architecture map.

dependencyDirection.name: Documentation-to-reader dependency
observedFacts: README.md contains the repository heading used as inspection context.
dependencyDirection.interpretation: No source-level dependency direction can be proven from this example alone.

moduleBoundaries.name: README boundary
observedFacts: The example repository exposes README.md as the only cited module-like artifact.
moduleBoundaries.interpretation: Runtime module boundaries are unknown in this minimal example.

businessLogicLocations.name: Business logic not observed
observedFacts: The cited file contains repository context rather than executable business rules.
businessLogicLocations.interpretation: Business logic cannot be located from the available example evidence.

frameworkGlueLocations.name: Framework glue not observed
observedFacts: The cited file does not show framework bootstrapping or adapter code.
frameworkGlueLocations.interpretation: Framework glue cannot be located from the available example evidence.

architectureRisks.name: Architecture evidence is shallow
observedFacts: Only README.md is cited in the example architecture output.
architectureRisks.interpretation: The architecture agent should treat the result as low-confidence until source files are inspected.

findings.claim: The example architecture output is limited to documentation-backed observations.
findings.recommendation: Inspect source files before making deeper architecture claims.
